creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Robert,

I'm also looking at this for the same reasons, and it seems they'll also require vuxml entries[0]. Since you're looking at 1.22.x update, I can start with 1.23 instead and security/vuxml instead.

If you prefer, I can handle 1.22.x update too.

References:
[0] https://groups.google.com/g/golang-announce/c/sSaUhLA-2SI

Thanks!
